economic_notes: Nation has investments in Ch-ihl-kway-uhk Forestry Limited Partnership (forestry operations near Chilliwack BC), Ch-ihl-kway-uhk Forestry Ltd., Ch-ihl-kway-uhk Tribe Society (property rentals), Centre Creek Limited Partnership (real property in Chilliwack River Valley), and Centre Creek Management Limited. Nation is economically dependent on federal and provincial government transfers.
notes: Audit is qualified due to exclusion of budgeted information (not a going concern qualification). Five business entities accounted for using modified equity method (GBEs): Ch-ihl-kway-uhk Forestry Limited Partnership, Ch-ihl-kway-uhk Forestry Ltd., Ch-ihl-kway-uhk Tribe Society, Centre Creek Limited Partnership, and Centre Creek Management Limited. Ottawa Trust Fund balance of $20,873 included in restricted cash; $949,111 transferred from Ottawa Trust Fund during the year (capital and revenue trust transfers). Deferred revenue of $533,068 relates to ISC Flood Mitigation Funding. No long-term debt on the First Nation's own balance sheet; Centre Creek LP carries $725,508 in long-term liabilities (due to related parties) but this is not consolidated. No remuneration schedule included in the financial statements provided. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $3,227,216 + Other government per segment $1,164,579 = $4,391,795. OSR calculated as total revenue $6,029,668 minus total government transfers $4,391,795 = $1,637,873.
